IC Sample View: This is an example output style. You can design the product differently if your reasoning is clear.

__EMPTY_2: This developer can merge work, but the total time to reach production is still slower than ideal. The product should help the user ask what is causing that delay.
1. Reduce PR size or ticket scope so feedback arrives faster.
2. Separate review delay from deployment delay before prescribing a fix.
3. Add one quality safeguard if the bug rate rises.
